                +----------------------------------------------------+
                |  Process                                           |
                |                                                    |
                |                       +----------+                 |
                |                   +-->|  Path 1  +-+               |
+---------+     |  +---------+      |   +----------+ |    +-------+  |     +----------+
|  Input  +-----o->|  Start  +------+                +--->|  End  +--o---->|  Output  |
+---------+     |  +---------+      |   +----------+ |    +-------+  |     +----------+
                |                   +-->|  Path 2  +-+               |
                |                       +----------+                 |
                |                                                    |
                |                                                    |
                +----------------------------------------------------+
